questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует Present Perfect с открытым временным периодом?

choices.text: I had a meeting this week.
I have had a meeting this week.
I have a meeting this week.
I will have a meeting this week.

questions.explanation: Для открытого периода (this week) используется Present Perfect, а не Simple Past или Present Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно описывает опыт в текущем месяце?

choices.text: She went to the cinema last month.
She has visited her family this month.
She visits her family this month.
She will visit her family this month.

questions.explanation: Временной период 'this month' требует Present Perfect, а не Simple Past или Present Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'so far' в отрицательной форме?

choices.text: She didn't make any mistakes so far.
She has not made any mistakes so far.
She has made many mistakes so far.
She makes mistakes so far.

questions.explanation: Для 'so far' используется Present Perfect, а не Simple Past.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'in my life' с Present Perfect?

choices.text: I have never seen a rainbow in my life.
I never saw a rainbow in my life.
I have never seen a rainbow before.
I saw a rainbow in my life.

questions.explanation: Период 'in my life' требует Present Perfect, а не Simple Past.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'before' в вопросе о опыте?

choices.text: Have you ever been to Paris before?
Have you been to Paris before?
Have you ever gone to Paris before?
Have you been to Paris before ever?

questions.explanation: Правильная конструкция: 'Have you ever... before?' без пропуска 'ever'.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'been' с временным периодом?

choices.text: She has gone to Paris twice.
She has been to Paris twice.
She has been to Paris before.
She has gone to Paris before.

questions.explanation: Для опыта используется 'been', а не 'gone', и 'twice' указывает на период.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант неправильно использует Simple Past с открытым периодом?

choices.text: I had three meetings this week.
She has visited her parents this month.
They went to the beach this summer.
He has read two books this month.

questions.explanation: Для открытого периода 'this week' нужно Present Perfect, а не Simple Past.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'in my life' с Present Perfect?

choices.text: I have never eaten sushi in my life.
I never ate sushi in my life.
I have never eaten sushi before.
I ate sushi in my life.

questions.explanation: Период 'in my life' требует Present Perfect, а не Simple Past.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'so far' для отрицательного утверждения?

choices.text: I have not visited any countries so far.
I did not visit any countries so far.
I have visited many countries so far.
I visit countries so far.

questions.explanation: Для 'so far' используется Present Perfect, а не Simple Past.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует Present Perfect с 'this year'?

choices.text: She has traveled to Europe this year.
She traveled to Europe this year.
She has traveled to Europe before.
She travels to Europe this year.

questions.explanation: Временной период 'this year' требует Present Perfect, а не Simple Past или Present Simple.
